verbatim_quote: Maybe you shouldn't reason about things in a way that doesn't make physical sense and so on, rather than just open domain language. In the next three years, I'd like to develop on this to produce agents that maybe co-design their own infrastructure and system, and maybe evolve their own infrastructure.
